title: Frugl Command Output — org membership additions (004-cli-org-join)
description: Structured --json output shapes ADDED or EXTENDED by 004-cli-org-join. These layer onto specs/001-cli-ingest-client/contracts/command-output.schema.json (FR-040). FR-036 contract surface. New: JoinResultOk / JoinResultError (frugl join --json, FR-021). Extended: WhoamiResultOk gains an additive `organization` field (FR-026); the upload-start NDJSON event gains an additive `organization` object (FR-030). All extensions are STRICTLY ADDITIVE — no existing 001 field is renamed or removed.

Role.description: The caller's Membership role, returned by the cloud and printed verbatim. The CLI never enumerates or reinterprets roles (spec Key Entities).

JoinResultOk.description: Single stdout JSON object for `frugl join --json` on success. Also emitted for 409 already_member (which is an idempotent no-op success, ok:true, exit 0 — research.md R-2 / FR-017). The plaintext invite code is NEVER present (SC-005 / FR-006).

JoinResultError.description: Single stdout JSON object for `frugl join --json` on a non-success, non-idempotent outcome. The `error` mirrors the cloud's typed error code; the exit code is the machine-actionable signal (see contracts/exit-codes.md). The plaintext invite code is NEVER present (SC-005 / FR-006).

message.description: Human-readable detail. Not parsed by consumers; the `error` code and the exit code are the machine-actionable signals.

details.description: Optional per-error fields passed through from the cloud response body. For wrong_org: current_org_name, current_org_slug, target_org_name. For rate_limited: retry_after_seconds.

WhoamiResultOkWithOrg.description: The 001 WhoamiResultOk object, EXTENDED with an additive `organization` field (FR-026). All 001 fields are unchanged and still required; `organization` is the only addition. It is the org object on a Membership, or null when the caller has no Membership (both cases are ok:true, exit 0 — FR-025).

organization.description: The caller's Organization, or null when the caller has no Membership.

UploadStartOrgExtension.description: NOT a top-level command-output object. Documents the ADDITIVE `organization` field added to the 001 `upload-start` NDJSON progress event (FR-030). The full event schema is specs/001-cli-ingest-client/contracts/progress-event.schema.json; this $def records only the addition. The field is always present on upload-start, because the ORG_REQUIRED gate (research.md R-7) guarantees a resolved member context before any upload begins — a no-org run never reaches upload-start.
